# Modal Resonance

> Independent AI advisory based in Berlin, Germany. Modal Resonance helps
> organizations assess where they stand with AI, move prototypes to reliable
> production, and evaluate AI systems against privacy, fairness, and EU AI Act
> requirements. Independent expertise, grounded in peer-reviewed research and
> hands-on delivery.

## Who

- Omar Ali Fdal, co-founder, AI Strategy and Engineering. Led an AI company from founding through acquisition, building production ML systems, RAG pipelines, and LLM applications for enterprise clients. [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oalifdal/)
- Dr. Matteo Giomi, co-founder, AI Research and Evaluation. Led AI privacy research at an enterprise data protection company, contributing to national standards bodies and developing evaluation methods now used across the industry. [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/matteo-giomi/)

## What we do

- **Strategy:** defining the right AI starting point. Frameworks for evaluating use cases, feasibility studies, proof of concepts and prototyping, and aligning investments with business priorities.
- **Engineering:** from prototype to production. Readiness assessments across data, infrastructure, and processes, deployment to production and setup of reliable observability pipelines to monitor behavior and costs.
- **Assurance:** evaluating AI systems already in production. Independent technical evaluation including GDPR compliance, red-teaming, and bias and fairness audits. Communicating the results to internal and external governance and regulatory stakeholders.
- **Frontier:** navigating agentic AI and emerging regulation. Risk mapping for tool-using and multi-agent systems, including EU AI Act classification and provider responsibility analysis.

## Credibility

- **Anonymeter**: open-source privacy risk measurement tool authored by the founders. [Repository](https://github.com/statice/anonymeter/) · [Peer-reviewed paper (PoPETs 2023)](https://petsymposium.org/popets/2023/popets-2023-0055.php)
- Anonymeter was evaluated by the French data protection authority (CNIL) and is used by enterprises across Europe.
- Contributions to NIST's Collaborative Research Cycle on privacy risk assessment.
- IEEE standardization work on synthetic data evaluation.
- Collaboration with NVIDIA on privacy-preserving methods.
- Named as inventors on pending patents: [Omar Ali Fdal](https://patents.google.com/patent/US20260057176A1/) · [Matteo Giomi](https://patents.google.com/patent/US20230401336A1/)

## Contact

- Website: https://modalresonance.com
- Location: Berlin, Germany
- Serving: DACH, EU, and international clients
